name: prescriptive-gpt
description: Research -> Plan -> Code (GPT-5.1-Codex) -> QA -> Observe — A/B vs prescriptive.json

phases.name: qa
phases.context_template:
Code was written to: {{out_dir}}
Detected project root: {{project_dir}}

Detect the project stack by inspecting {{project_dir}} (or {{out_dir}} if empty), then run the appropriate test runner via pytest_exec EXACTLY ONCE:
  - Cargo.toml      → cargo test
  - package.json    → npx vitest run / npx jest / npm test
  - go.mod          → go test ./...
  - pyproject.toml /
    requirements.txt → PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -v

Always cd into the project directory first. Return a JSON summary with passed/failed/errors/status/summary/details. Do NOT call pytest_exec more than once.
